executive_summary.finding: EGLD price retraced -16.9% to $3.88, fully unwinding last week's +14.7% rally. Z-score reverted +3.40σ → -0.45σ. Two-week round-trip — the "decoupled rally" thesis is dead.
NET +169K EGLD INFLOW to exchanges during the -17% decline (bearish). Binance +76K, Coinbase +39K (+64.9%), Gate.io +21K (+67.7%), UPbit +14.5K. Only KuCoin and MEXC saw outflows.

INVESTIGATION CLOSED on Unknown Whale erd17l22: outflow traced through erd1nhtq4 → erd1ecyftln → OTC Distribution Wallet + UPbit OTC Desk. Confirmed as OTC SOURCE wallet — adds the missing upstream link in the cross-exchange settlement pipeline.
DEX volume -77% to $74.9K — fully reverts last week's +5.86σ peak. Run #7 anomaly correctly classified as event-driven, NOT regime shift. Closing the regime-shift watch.

Yield-chase migration PROMOTED FROM TREND TO REGIME SHIFT (3rd consecutive week). Ninja Staking +19.4K this week. Cumulative across 3 weeks: ninjastaking +37.9K, egldstakingprovider +38.1K. Both providers near-tripled their stake.

Hatom Lending TVL +13.6% in EGLD terms during the -16.9% price drop — confirms the bilateral inverse rule: depositors accumulate during dips, withdraw during rallies. Run #7 hypothesis validated symmetrically.

New validator MrsEGLD joined with 158K EGLD first-week stake (largest new joiner this report). Identity "mgstaking" left (had 163K previously). Net validator change: -1, but net stake change essentially flat.
Binance Staking wallet 3.11M EGLD UNCHANGED — the 377K parked from run #7's unstaking event has not moved for a second week. Still sitting as an open option in Binance custody.

network_health.analysis: EGLD price retraced -16.9% to $3.88 — fully unwinding last week's +14.7% rally and then some. The +3.40σ z-score from run #7 reverted to -0.45σ (normal range). BTC -1.4% and ETH -3.0% (24h) — EGLD underperformed both. Market cap dropped to $116.2M (-16.8%). Staked ratio slipped to 48.29% (-0.04pp), now -1.21pp from the May 4 high. Network activity 1,273,917 txs in 7d (181,988/day) holds steady — chain throughput unaffected by price action. The two-week 'EGLD/BTC outperformance' streak from runs #6-#7 has fully reverted in one week, confirming run #7's flag that the +14.7% rally was event-driven, not regime.

whale_intelligence.analysis:
NET EXCHANGE INFLOW: +169K EGLD during a -17% week — classic bearish setup, coins moving on-chain to exchanges. Binance +76K (hot wallet erd1sdsl drove most of it), Coinbase +39K (+64.9% on hot wallet), Gate.io +21K (+67.7%), UPbit +14.5K. Only KuCoin (-5.5K) and MEXC (-0.7K) declined. 

MAJOR INVESTIGATION CLOSED: Unknown Whale erd17l22 (last week +58K, now -26K) — outflow TRACED to OTC infrastructure. erd17l22 → erd1nhtq4 (routing wallet, nonce 2543) → erd1ecyftln (nonce 50) → OTC Distribution Wallet + UPbit OTC Desk. erd17l22 is therefore an OTC SOURCE wallet feeding into the cross-exchange settlement pipeline — not an end-user whale. This validates the run #7 hypothesis that the OTC fabric is fed by upstream supply wallets, not just by exchange treasury. Two new ephemeral routing wallets discovered (erd1nhtq4, erd1ecyftln) for known-addresses.json. 

OTC pipeline throughput: 76.6K EGLD across 55 tracked router txs in 7d. Largest edges: Cross-Exchange OTC → Bybit (25.7K), OTC routers → Bybit (20.6K), OTC routers → Binance (17.1K), OTC routers → KuCoin (13.4K). Pipeline continues operating in net-INTO-exchanges direction. 

Whale tiers (top-50 apples-to-apples): mega_whales flat (2 wallets, +14.5K from UPbit), large_whales +58K (Binance erd1sdsl drove it), mid_whales +12K (broad small accumulation). No new mega_whales emerged. Binance Staking wallet at 3.11M EGLD is unchanged — the 377K parked from run #7's unstaking event is still sitting there as an open option.

staking_intelligence.analysis:
Staking remains competitive (HHI 0.0190, top-5 20.0%). Total delegated 11,260,522 EGLD across 107 active providers. 

YIELD-CHASE REGIME SHIFT CONFIRMED (3rd consecutive week). Top weekly gainers all 0%-fee 9%+ APR providers: ninjastaking +19.4K (largest WoW gain this report), egldstakingprovider +6.9K, orius +4.9K, valuestaking +3.2K, procryptostaking +1.3K. Cumulative ninjastaking over runs #6→#8: +15.5K, +3K, +19.4K = +37.9K. Egldstakingprovider over same window: +14.2K, +17K, +6.9K = +38.1K. Both providers near tripled stake in 3 weeks. 

Losers: all 7-8% APR 0.1% fee providers (orangestaking -9.4K, arcstake -6.1K, aurentum -5.0K). The 1pp APR spread continues to extract capital from mid-tier providers. 

APR distribution: 67% of stake sits in the 8-9% bucket (72 providers, 6.6M EGLD), 19% in 7-8% (21 providers, 2.1M), 11% in 9-10% (8 providers, 1.2M). The 9-10% bucket has gained share for 3 weeks running. 

Delegator churn: total 179,011 (-39). 21 providers gaining vs 52 losing — broad-based delegator exodus from mid-tier. With staked EGLD flat (+11K), this is the 'concentrated re-staking by fewer larger holders' pattern from the methodology matrix. 

Validator joiners: 1 new (MrsEGLD with 158K EGLD locked — significant first-week stake suggests a new operator with prior off-chain liquidity). Leavers: 2 (mgstaking at 163K previously, plus one unnamed at 75K). Notable net validator dynamic: -1 net provider but +158K stake from MrsEGLD offsets the loss of mgstaking 163K.

token_activity.analysis:
DEX volume CRASHED back to $74.9K — a -77% retracement from last week's $328K spike. The +5.86σ z-score (largest in tracked history) has fully reverted to -0.67σ, confirming run #7's flag that it was event-driven, not a regime shift. WEGLD/USDC dominance held at 91.6% (vs 91% last week) — but at absolute volumes below 50% of prior baseline. xExchange aggregate TVL $2.27M (-9.7% USD; +8.7% in EGLD terms due to price drop). 

Token holder counts: 8th consecutive week of small declines across all top-10 tokens (-18 to -103 each, very gentle). This is the established airdrop-decay pattern. WrappedUSDC at 82,198 holders (-103) remains the most actively-used real token. 

Newly-issued tokens: zero found in the 7d window. The /tokens?sort=timestamp endpoint returned HTTP 400 (silently unsupported); client-side filter on the /tokens?sort=transactions=500 dataset also returned zero matches, meaning the token-issuance pipeline is quiet this week. This is the third run carrying this gap forward — the ESDT system contract issuance scan workaround remains TODO.

TVL in USD -5.6% (price effect), but TVL in EGLD terms +13.6% (~+135K EGLD). Confirms run #7 inverse rule: lending TVL EXPANDS in EGLD terms during price declines (depositors accumulate during dips).
SEGLD-3ad2d0 mcap $3.46M + SWTAO-356a25 mcap $1.09M. TVL in EGLD terms +21.9% during the price drop — strong LSD accumulation signal.
USH-111e09 mcap $690K — stablecoin scale unchanged, mild +0.7% week-over-week

-13.7% WoW from 8,099. Mirroring overall on-chain throughput decline this week.
-36% WoW from 3,305. Activity broadly lower across all DEX-adjacent protocols.

defi_activity.analysis:
Hatom dominates MultiversX DeFi: Lending $4.38M + LSD $4.55M + USH $691K = $9.6M, ~67% of tracked TVL. 

KEY METHODOLOGY VALIDATION (run #7 'price-direction asymmetry on lending TVL' rule confirmed in reverse): During this week's -16.9% price drop, Hatom Lending TVL dropped only 5.6% in USD (= +13.6% in EGLD terms), and Hatom LSD only -1.3% in USD (= +18.4% in EGLD terms). Symmetrical to run #7 where the +14.7% rally saw TVL flat USD (= -13% EGLD), this week's -16.9% drop saw TVL flat USD (= +14% EGLD). Pattern: depositors withdraw during rallies (capture gains), accumulate during dips (DCA). 

DEX/aggregator throughput collapsed alongside DEX volume: XOXNO Aggregator -40.8%, OneDex -13.7%, JEXchange -36%. Run #7's flagged XOXNO Aggregator +37.8% spike to 16.8K transfers is now confirmed event-driven (revert to 9.9K). xExchange TVL $2.27M (-9.7% USD, +8.7% EGLD). 

No notable new SC deployments this run. AshSwap pools show zero EGLD across tracked admin contracts (Farm Router, Aggregator, etc.) — AshSwap stableswap TVL is in stable-asset pools not tracked here; the address set may need expansion next run.

anomalies.description: Staked ratio dropped to 48.29% (z=-1.81σ, approaching anomaly threshold). Continues the reversal from the May 4 high of 49.50% — now -1.21pp in two weeks. The 50% milestone forecast (run #6) keeps moving further away.

Unknown Whale erd17l22 (run #7 critical investigation candidate) -26K EGLD this week, distributed in 13 chunks of 2K through routing wallet erd1nhtq4 → erd1ecyftln → OTC Distribution Wallet + UPbit OTC Desk. Confirms erd17l22 as an OTC SOURCE wallet, completing the cross-exchange settlement pipeline taxonomy. Funding source of last week's +58K still unknown — but the destination chain is now mapped.

DEX volume reverted -77% from last week's z=+5.86σ peak to z=-0.67σ (within normal range). Confirms run #7's flag that the spike was event-driven. The +5.86σ event was a one-week anomaly, not a regime shift — closing the regime-shift watch.

consecutive_streaks.interpretation: Yield-chase across 0%-fee 9%+ APR providers (ninjastaking, egldstakingprovider, orius, valuestaking, procryptostaking) is now in week 3. Cumulative: ninjastaking +37.9K (3 weeks: +15.5K, +3K, +19.4K), egldstakingprovider +38.1K (+14.2K, +17K, +6.9K). This is now a structural pattern, not a one-week event — PROMOTING from trend to regime shift.
8th consecutive week of small holder count declines across all top-10 tokens (-18 to -103 per token this week). Structural airdrop decay continues — confirmed baseline behavior.

Hatom LSD TVL in EGLD terms grew through both the +14.7% rally (run #7) and the -16.9% decline (run #8). Asymmetric: LSD accumulates EGLD-denominated value during both price directions. Strong adoption signal.

regime_shifts.description: Run #7 +5.86σ spike to $328K has retraced -77% to $74.9K (z=-0.67σ). NOT a regime shift — fully mean-reverted. The single-week spike is correctly classified as event-driven anomaly (close the regime-shift watch).

PROMOTED from trend to regime shift after 3rd consecutive week. 0%-fee 9%+ APR providers (ninjastaking, egldstakingprovider, orius, valuestaking, procryptostaking) cumulatively absorbed +60K EGLD over 3 weeks. The asymmetric APR-fee opportunity zone is structurally pulling delegated capital — expect this pattern to persist.

watch_list.reason: Ninja Staking +19.4K this week (largest single-provider gain), Egld Staking Provider +6.9K. Promoting from trend to regime shift. Track if pattern continues into week 4 — would confirm permanent capital reallocation.

watch_list.reason: Classic bearish setup: coins moving onto exchanges during declines. Binance +76K, Coinbase +39K, Gate.io +21K. Watch next week for either: continued inflows (sustained sell pressure) or reversal (capitulation done).

watch_list.reason: 76.6K EGLD routed through 55 router txs in 7d. Largest edges: Cross-Exchange OTC → Bybit (25.7K), OTC → Bybit (20.6K). Pipeline direction net INTO exchanges this week (vs distribution last week). Track edge direction reversal.
Balance unchanged this week (flat at 992K). 5 weeks dormant after Apr 18 Coinbase OTC receipt. 4th-largest non-system account. Watching for movement signal.
New identity entered top providers list with significant first-week stake. Single-event signal of off-chain liquidity arriving. Investigate identity background and stake source.

watch_list.reason: Both -15K this week (used down). Third lifecycle cycle observed. Track for new cycle reset (new injection from upstream source — likely erd17l22 pattern).
Confirmed structural pattern (airdrop decay). Watch for any week the streak breaks — would indicate real user growth.
48.29% — down -1.21pp in two weeks. If declines continue, will trip z>-2σ anomaly threshold next week. Watch for further unstaking signals.

endpoints_that_failed: /tokens?sort=timestamp (HTTP 400) — endpoint silently rejects timestamp as a sort key, only accepts accounts/transactions/price/marketCap. Client-side filter on a 500-token /tokens?sort=transactions sample yielded 0 issuances in window.
api_quirks: INVESTIGATIVE BREAKTHROUGH: Query Unknown Whale erd17l22 → trace recipient erd1nhtq4 → trace next-hop erd1ecyftln → resolves to OTC Distribution Wallet + UPbit OTC Desk. The 3-hop pattern is reproducible: start at any whale, follow large outbound txs, find pass-through routers with mid-high nonce + near-zero balance.

Whale tier stratification needs apples-to-apples top-50 vs top-50 comparison — fetching top-100 vs prev top-50 silently inflated mid_whale tier (+30 wallets reported). Always trim current to match previous sample size before comparing tier totals.

/tokens?search=Hatom is reliable but returns tokens with same ticker but different hex suffixes (HEGLD-99fe43 vs HEGLD-d61095). The correct mainnet H-token suffixes are: HUSDC-d80042, HEGLD-d61095, HUSDT-6f0914, HWBTC-49ca31, HWETH-b3d17e, HBUSD-ac1fca, HHTM-e03ba5, HMEX-df6df7, HUTK-4fa4b2, HWTAO-2e9136, HSEGLD-c13a4e, HSWTAO-6df80c. /tokens?search=Hatom is more reliable than guessing identifiers.

methodology_changes: CONFIRMED INVERSE RULE: lending TVL in EGLD terms ACCUMULATES during price declines (Hatom Lending +13.6% EGLD this week, vs run #7's -13% during the rally). Bilaterally symmetric — DCA behavior during dips, gain-capture during rallies.

CONFIRMED: yield-chase migration promoted from trend to REGIME SHIFT (3 consecutive weeks of 0%-fee 9%+ APR providers gaining at expense of 7-8% APR 0.1% fee providers). Cumulative absorption +60K EGLD.

NEW DETECTION METHOD: when a Unknown Whale shows large WoW balance change, query its top 1-2 outbound recipients and trace through 2-3 hops — likely terminates at a known OTC desk. Validated this run with erd17l22 → erd1nhtq4 → erd1ecyftln → OTC Distribution. Reproducible pattern.
CLOSED: DEX volume regime-shift watch (run #7 +5.86σ → run #8 -0.67σ). Single-week event, fully mean-reverted. Anomaly classification correct.
meta_learning.most_valuable_insight: Unknown Whale erd17l22 OTC source confirmed. Last week we flagged the +58K accumulation as the largest non-exchange whale gain (critical investigation candidate). This week we traced its -26K distribution: 13 chunks of 2K EGLD → erd1nhtq4 (nonce 2543) → erd1ecyftln (nonce 50) → OTC Distribution Wallet + UPbit OTC Desk. This means erd17l22 is an OTC SOURCE wallet — completing the cross-exchange settlement pipeline taxonomy (source → router → desk → desk-router → exchange). Pattern is reproducible.
meta_learning.top_recommendation: Build a "OTC supply tracker": enumerate all whales that distribute regular-amount chunks (1-5K EGLD typical) to mid-high-nonce routing wallets within the same week. erd17l22 just gave us the template. Likely uncover 5-10 more OTC source wallets feeding the desk infrastructure. This would close the loop on the OTC pipeline: source → router → desk → router → exchange.
recommendations_for_next_run: TOP PRIORITY: Apply the erd17l22 OTC-source detection template to discover other OTC source wallets. Scan top-100 non-exchange whales for ones distributing 1-5K EGLD chunks weekly to nonce-2000+ routing wallets with near-zero balance.
Investigate erd17l22 inbound transactions spanning 14+ days to identify who funded last week's +58K (still unknown source).

Verify yield-chase regime: 4th week of consecutive 0%-fee provider gains promotes the pattern from "regime shift" to "permanent reallocation". If reverts → still regime shift but at low confidence.
